name: Club Magatsuchi
description:
After 9 months of work, we finally arrived to this moment... THE CLUB MAGATSUCHI CYOS!!!! IT took 9 months and we did it!

WARNING:

A Proxy is extremely necessary to even use this bot. Use whatever Proxy you want, but the bot doesn't work in JLLM.
